Video.summary: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario ōThe Big Hurtö Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features BrazilÆs Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Video.summary: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!
Video.grandparentTitle: Shock n Awe - Episode 01
Video.title: Shock n Awe - Episode 01

Image.alt: Shock n Awe - Episode 01
Shock n Awe - Episode 01
Shock n Awe - Episode 01

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Luiz Rocha v. Myrza Tebuev

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Brittney Allan.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Brittney Allan
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Brittney Allan

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Brittney Allan
Out Of The Cage - Brittney Allan
Out Of The Cage - Brittney Allan

Video.summary: Mike Short comes from a history of street fighting and recognizes the importance of training and discipline. He has been coaching Boxing for many years and relishes the fact that his entire family comes together at his events, run out of Dekada Gym.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Mike Short
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Mike Short

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Mike Short
Day in the Life of a Coach - Mike Short
Day in the Life of a Coach - Mike Short

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 35 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Anton Tokarchuk vs. Jesse Day Rider; Lee Popp vs. Dauda Keita.
